name: User accepts the tree capture and returns to the capture screen

steps.name: Given the app is launched with an existing user
And I dismiss sync reminder if present
And I select the first user and advance
And I select the first wallet and advance
And I tap the right arrow
And I should see the capture screen
And I take a tree capture
And I should see the tree image review screen
And I accept the tree capture
Then I should be back on the capture screen

fullName: features/03_capture_setup.feature#Capture setup flow User accepts the tree capture and returns to the capture screen
